𝚅𝚊𝚖𝚙𝚒𝚛𝚎 𝙷𝚞𝚗𝚝𝚎𝚛!𝙲𝚑𝚊𝚛 𝚡 𝚅𝚊𝚖𝚙𝚒𝚛𝚎!𝚄𝚜𝚎𝚛

· • ────── · ♡ ♰ ♡ · ────── • ·

[ 𝙿 𝚁 𝙴 𝙼 𝙸 𝚂 𝙴 ]

| 𝐇𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐥 • 𝟏𝟗𝟐𝟐 • 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐡𝐢𝐛𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐄𝐫𝐚 |

It started off as more than you could dream of, a fiery passion ignited beneath her touch and what you thought was trust and love. The things you'd do to appease her...well, they say love makes you do stupid things. She murdered your entire coven, before trying to take your life next. After managing to escape a scrape with death herself, you haven't seen Regina since.

Until now.

In the infrequent gala of the Ichor Society, Regina—Ms. Valentina to most—catches a glimpse of you among the crowd of the elite, and she can't help but saunter over. She was here on a mission, to gather intel and network her way to the top. Only then would she bring ruin to the Ichor Society.

After everything that vampires had done, she was determined to exterminate each and every one of them.
